name: Grok-4
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (size undisclosed; RL-trained at pretraining scale on Colossus, ~200K H100s)
note: Native tool-use reasoning flagship; led ARC-AGI-2 at launch. Official model card published by xAI (data.x.ai). Deprecated in the May 15, 2026 retirement wave, redirects to Grok 4.3.

results.notes: ARC-AGI v1 (semi-private eval), independently verified by the ARC Prize Foundation; corroborated by a second independent source (gpt.gekko.de) citing the same 66.6% figure.

USAMO 2025 (Olympiad Math Proofs), no tools. Read directly off xAI's official launch page bar chart (Grok 4 bar labeled 37.5, vs. Grok 4 Heavy w/ Python 61.9); corroborated by datacamp.com/blog/grok-4's benchmark table citing the identical 37.5% figure.

Aider polyglot coding benchmark, high reasoning effort, run via openrouter/x-ai/grok-4 (diff edit format), pass_rate_2 = 79.6% (92/225 first-try, 179/225 with retry), 97.3% well-formed edits. Independently run and published by the Aider project, not an xAI-reported figure.

verificationNotes:
Confirmed real: launched July 9, 2025 via livestream (Teslarati, TechCrunch, etc.), official model card exists at data.x.ai/2025-08-20-grok-4-model-card.pdf. GPQA 87.5, AIME 91.7, and LiveCodeBench 79 confirmed literally present on datacamp.com/blog/grok-4 via direct fetch. HLE 25.4 confirmed literally on scientificamerican.com ('scored 25.4 percent'). CORRECTED the ARC-AGI-2 sourceUrl: the original x.com/xai tweet URL returned HTTP 402 (paywalled, unfetchable); replaced with introl.com, which was fetched directly and literally contains '15.9%' attributed to Grok 4 Thinking mode on ARC-AGI-2 — independently corroborated by ARC Prize Foundation's own announcement (x.com/arcprize) and multiple outlets (Built In, Teslarati). Context window 256K and pricing $3/$15 confirmed independently. 200K H100 Colossus claim confirmed via xAI/NVIDIA/Tom's Hardware coverage. 2026-07-14 coverage pass: rendered x.ai/news/grok-4 directly in a live browser (the model card PDF is a safety-only document with no capability benchmarks, and static fetches of x.ai/news/grok-4 return HTTP 403) and read the exact bar-chart values off xAI's own launch page for HLE (with tools, full set) = 38.6 and USAMO 2025 = 37.5, both new to the corpus; also confirmed GPQA 87.5, LiveCodeBench 79, AIME'25 91.7, and ARC-AGI-2 15.9 match the values already on file, byte-for-byte. Added Aider polyglot 79.6% (independent, aider.chat/docs/leaderboards, run 2025-07-11 via openrouter/x-ai/grok-4 high reasoning). Explicitly did NOT add SWE-bench, tau-bench, BFCL, or MMLU-Pro figures circulating on SEO content-mill blogs (tokenmix.ai, callsphere.ai, benchlm.ai) — those numbers are unsourced/templated across multiple unrelated posts (identical boilerplate phrasing, comparisons to future unreleased models) and could not be corroborated by xAI's own launch page, swebench.com's official leaderboard (no Grok-4 entry found under any harness), or llm-stats.com's BFCL-v3/MMLU-Pro trackers (no Grok-4 entry found). HMMT 2025 (90.0, confirmed on the official chart) has no corresponding taxonomy slug so was left out.

2026-07-16 core-benchmark gap-fill pass (mmlu/math/humaneval/swe-bench/mmmu): checked xAI's own self-reported materials (DataCamp's Grok 4 benchmark table -- covers GPQA/AIME25/LiveCodeBench/HMMT25/USAMO25 but has no MMLU, MATH, or HumanEval rows for either Grok 4 or Grok 4 Heavy) and Artificial Analysis's own Grok 4 model page (direct fetch: tracks GDPval-AA, tau3-Banking, Terminal-Bench, SciCode, HLE, GPQA, CritPt, AA-Omniscience, AA-LCR, MMMU-Pro -- no MMLU, MATH, or HumanEval). Cross-checked independent trackers: llm-stats.com's own per-benchmark leaderboards (fetched directly) show MMLU tracking 100 models, MATH tracking 71, and HumanEval tracking 66 -- Grok-2 and Grok-2 mini appear on all three, but neither Grok-4 nor Grok-4 Heavy appears on any of them; llm-stats.com's dedicated Grok-4 model page independently confirms only 7 benchmarks are tracked for this model at all (AIME 2025, HMMT25, GPQA, LiveCodeBench, HLE, USAMO25, ARC-AGI v2) -- MMLU/MATH/HumanEval are absent by omission, not zero-score. Sibling cross-reference: grok-3-think.json and grok-3-standard.json in this same corpus already carry MMLU-Pro (not MMLU) and no MATH/HumanEval rows, confirming xAI shifted its self-reported benchmark suite away from classic MMLU/MATH/HumanEval starting with Grok 3 and never returned to them for Grok 4. Concluding this is a genuine, expected absence (legacy/near-saturated benchmarks the lab chose not to re-run and no independent tracker has back-filled), not a research gap -- omitted mmlu, math, and humaneval rather than guess. Separately, added two real independent scores surfaced while cross-checking Vals AI's Grok 4 model page (vals.ai/models/grok_grok-4-0709, verified via live browser render since the raw HTML/text fetch returns placeholder 0.0% values before client-side JS resolves the real numbers): swe-bench 57.80% (rank 62/70) and mmmu 76.27% (rank 42/82), both independent/Vals-sourced and new to this record.
